_comment: Light, warn-FIRST naming dictionary for grandmaster activity C2 (ordlista-check). Seeded from .cursor/rules/terminology.mdc (forvaxlingstabellen) + docs/architecture/glossary.md (Legacy). Deliberately SMALL and NOT exhaustive — canonical source of truth stays the glossary. Consumed by scripts/dev/check-term-coverage.mjs, which only WARNS and always exits 0. Blocking enforcement is a separate, later decision.
_notes: tier 2 / tier 3 are intentionally NOT seeded: 'tier-2 preview' and 'Tier-3 Integration' are canonical glossary usage, so a broad match would be false-positive-prone. Add later if a precise rule emerges. Per-entry knobs: caseSensitive (default false), scope (subset of scan dirs; default all), ignorePathContains (skip paths where the alias is legitimate, e.g. /api/v0/).

forbiddenAliases.note: Legacy brief-typ. Anvand siteBriefSchema / Deep Brief.
Legacy namn pa de statiska produktreglerna (config/prompt-core/).
Legacy preview-term. sandboxId/sandboxUrl lever kvar enbart som kompatibilitetsalias.
Bara nar du menar admin-backoffice. Generella app-dashboards i genererad sajtkod ar OK — darfor docs-only seed.
v0 betyder 3 saker (API-versionering, Mallar-tab, naming debt). Advisory — verifiera mot koden vilken betydelse som avses.
